lesson_title: Complex Texts, Literature and Culture: Speaking Lesson 5
learning_objective: Learners can critique, refine, interpret nuance and produce expert-level responses in a speaking task about critical synthesis.
cefr_outcome: Learners can understand virtually everything heard or read and express themselves precisely in complex situations.
learner_facing_explanation: In this lesson you will practise speaking for complex texts, literature and culture. You will learn useful language connected to critical synthesis and practise idiomatic compression. By the end, you should be able to complete a short real-life task and explain your answer clearly at C2 level.
complete_teaching_input: Focus language: idiomatic compression. Vocabulary theme: critical synthesis. The teacher introduces the target language in a meaningful context, models pronunciation and form, checks meaning with concept questions, and moves learners from controlled practice to freer use. At C2, learners should critique, refine, interpret nuance and produce expert-level responses with increasing independence. The lesson should use board examples, short teacher modelling, pair practice, feedback and a final communicative task.
examples: Example 1: I can use idiomatic compression to talk about critical synthesis.
Example 2: The learner gives a C2 answer with clear meaning and correct key language.
Example 3: The learner checks, improves and repeats the answer after feedback.
Example 4: The learner uses one linking phrase or support phrase suitable for C2.

interactive_practice.prompt: Choose the best sentence using idiomatic compression.
options: Correct use of idiomatic compression in a C2 sentence.
Incorrect word order with idiomatic compression.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Correct. The sentence uses idiomatic compression accurately.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check the form and meaning of idiomatic compression.

interactive_practice.prompt: Match the critical synthesis phrase to its meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Good matching. You understand the phrase meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Look again at the context and key words.

interactive_practice.prompt: Build a complete answer for the lesson task.
interactive_practice.model_answer: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand critical synthesis.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Well done. Your sentence is complete and meaningful.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check that your sentence has a subject, verb and clear meaning.

correct_answers.P3: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand critical synthesis.

instant_feedback.correct: Correct. Continue to the next step.
instant_feedback.partly_correct: Good start. Check accuracy and add one more detail.
instant_feedback.incorrect: Try again. Review the model and look at the key language.

teacher_notes: Begin with a quick diagnostic question. Model the target form idiomatic compression. Use choral repetition if pronunciation is important. Monitor pair work and record three common errors. Finish with delayed correction and one confidence-building success point.
homework_task: Write or record five sentences about critical synthesis using language from this lesson.

assessment_task.task_title: C2 Speaking Check - Complex Texts, Literature and Culture
assessment_task.instructions: Complete a short speaking task using idiomatic compression and vocabulary from critical synthesis.
success_criteria: Uses idiomatic compression with reasonable accuracy
Uses vocabulary connected to critical synthesis
Responds at the expected CEFR level

criteria.name: Language control
criteria.descriptor: Uses idiomatic compression and sentence structure accurately.

criteria.name: Vocabulary range
criteria.descriptor: Uses appropriate words connected to critical synthesis.

criteria.name: Fluency/coherence
criteria.descriptor: Organises ideas clearly for the level.

speaking_task: Speak for 60-120 seconds about critical synthesis. Use at least two examples and one reason.
writing_task: Write a short C2 response about critical synthesis. Include the target language: idiomatic compression.

listening_audio.script: Audio script for C2-M02-L05. Speaker one: Today we are practising critical synthesis. Speaker two: I need to use idiomatic compression correctly. Speaker one: Listen carefully and choose the answer that best matches the meaning.

visual_activity_cards.title: Idiomatic Compression form
visual_activity_cards.alt_text: Visual grammar card for idiomatic compression
